metadata.description: Promote v1.4.0 — Source-Truth Ledger + Single-Run. NEW phase P0.5 ingests the product itself as source-of-truth for STRUCTURE+EXAMPLES claims (prevents adjacent stories that aren't IN the product). Quality Gate #7 enriched (#7.1 product grounding, #7.2 structural reference match hard-fail, #7.3 anecdote source). Single-run P4 produces full configured window (default 90 days, --days N flag) — content-batcher skill deleted. 1 entry point + 38 internal prompts under dual contract (anti-fabrication + product-promotion).

plugins.name: promote
plugins.description: v1.4.0 BREAKING — Source-Truth Ledger + Single-Run. NEW phase P0.5 PRODUCT CONTENT INGESTION (subagent product-content-ingester ingests product TOC/docs/syllabus into intake/product-content.md as source-of-truth). NEW STRUCTURE/EXAMPLES claim categories (sourced EXCLUSIVELY from product-content.md, not from author interviews — prevents v1.3.0 fabrication of inferred chapters). NEW must_quote_from field in operator-consultations P3.C. NEW Quality Gate #7 sub-checks #7.1/#7.2/#7.3 (product grounding + structural reference match hard-fail + anecdote source). DELETED content-batcher skill (folded into strategist). NEW single-run P4 produces full configured window. 1 skill exposed (promote-strategist) backed by 38 internal prompts (16 operators + 9 personas + 8 frameworks + 1 orchestrator + 4 utility incl. NEW product-content-ingester). Dual contract (anti-fabrication v1.3.0 + product-promotion v1.4.0) bound to 34 internal prompts via references/anti-fabrication-contract.md.
